steps.title: Look for a shared feature
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the spoon and the purse. The best sentence must mention both artifacts and state what they have in common.

steps.title: Avoid one-sided or differing facts
steps.content: Choice A mentions only the spoon. Choice C and Choice D emphasize date differences instead of a similarity. The sentence that says both artifacts are featured in Hina Hanta and are relevant to Choctaw history meets the goal. The answer is B.
